response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, recently completed its Series A funding round, raising $8.5 million from notable investors including Sequoia Capital and Y Combinator at a $42 million valuation. The company has built a team of 18 people and is demonstrating strong traction with $120,000 in monthly recurring revenue and impressive 25% month-over-month growth. This combination of solid financial metrics and backing from top-tier investors positions DataFlow AI as a promising player in the competitive data infrastructure sector.
